popularStory.headline: en.Wikipedia Isabella of Angoulême
popularStory.description: Isabella of Angoulême (French: Isabelle d'Angoulême, IPA: [izabɛl dɑ̃ɡulɛm]; c. 1186[1]/1188[2] – 4 June 1246) was queen consort of England as the second wife of King John from 1200 until John's death …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England於大約1187年出生在法國波特-哈倫斯哈倫特安古利e時，她的父親Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême28歲，母親Lady Alice de Courtenay28歲。她於1200年8月24日與John King of England在法國延波迪奧結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1246年6月4日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易享年60歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England于大约1187年出生在法国波特-哈倫斯哈倫特安古利e时，她的父亲Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême28岁，母亲Lady Alice de Courtenay28岁。她于1200年8月24日与John King of England在法国延波迪奧结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1246年6月4日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易享年60岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易。

nameMeanings.name: Isabelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isabel
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England was born about 1187, in Angoulême, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France, her father, Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême, was 28 and her mother, Lady Alice de Courtenay, was 28. She married John King of England on 24 August 1200, in Bordeaux, Guyenne, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 4 June 1246, in Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 60, and was buried in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England est née environ 1187, à Angoulême, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, France, son père, Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice de Courtenay, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé John King of England le 24 août 1200, à Bordeaux, Guyenne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 4 juin 1246, à Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England um 1187 in Angoulême, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême 28 und ihre Mutter Lady Alice de Courtenay 28. Sie hat am 24. August 1200 in Bordeaux, Guyenne, Frankreich John King of England geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 4. Juni 1246 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England è nata il circa 1187 nel Angoulême, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, sua padre, Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Lady Alice de Courtenay, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato John King of England il 24 agosto 1200, nel Bordeaux, Guyenne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 4 giugno 1246, nel Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of Englandが約1187年にフランスポイトウ-チャーエンツチャーエントアンゴウルeメで生まれた時，父Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulêmeは28歳，母Lady Alice de Courtenayは28歳であった。1200年8月24日にフランスグイエンボルディーウックスでJohn King of Englandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1246年6月4日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーで60歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイにて埋葬された。

ko.Fontevraud-l'Abbaye, Departement de Main: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이
ko.Angers,49007,Maine-et-Loire,Pays de la L: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤그르스
ko.Fontrevault Abbey, Fontrevault, Maine-Et: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르
ko.lifeSummary: Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England(이)가 대략 1187년 프랑스 포이토우-처츠 처트 앤굴e에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alice de Courtenay(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1200년 8월 24일 프랑스 가예니 볼도스에서 John King of England(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1246년 6월 4일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England nasceu aproximadamente 1187, em Angoulême, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, França, seu pai, Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice de Courtenay, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com John King of England em 24 de agosto de 1200, em Bordeaux, Guyenne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 4 de junho de 1246, em Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.Angers,49007,Maine-et-Loire,Pays de la L: ангирс, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.Fontrevault Abbey, Fontrevault, Maine-Et: меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England родилась около 1187 г. в местности ангоулeм, чарент, поитоу-чарентесь, Франция, её отцу по имени Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice de Courtenay, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John King of England 24 августа 1200 г. в местности бордокс, гуиенн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 4 июня 1246 г. в местности меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabelle d'Angoulême Queen of England nació aproximadamente 1187, en Angoulême, Charente, Poitou-Charentes, Francia, su papá, Aymer Taillefer Count of Angoulême, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Alice de Courtenay, tenía 28 años. Se casó con John King of England el 24 de agosto de 1200, en Bordeaux, Guyenne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 4 de junio de 1246, en Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
